heading: Empowering Women Co-ops
content: Support for rural GIE co-ops in eastern Senegal, guaranteeing fair purchasing prices and structural inclusion.

heading: Quality Assurance
content: Rigorous aflatoxin testing and 100% natural, premium peanut paste processing, meeting international HACCP standards.

heading: AgriTech Innovation
content: Smart weather tracking, audio guiding in local languages, and visual disease diagnosis directly from the fields.

heading: Traceability & Impact
content: Every jar has a QR code linking the consumer directly to the specific GIE cooperative of women that produced it.
